title: Asha's Starlight Adventure
synopsis: When little Asha discovers that the stars have disappeared from the night sky, she feels scared and worried. With the help of her magical teddy bear and new friend Luna the moon rabbit, Asha embarks on a gentle adventure to bring back the missing stars and learns that being brave means asking for help when you need it.

pages.text: Asha loved looking at the twinkling stars before bedtime. Tonight, she pressed her face against her bedroom window, but the sky was dark and empty. "Where are all the stars?" she whispered, feeling scared and confused.

illustration.description: A young South Asian girl with long dark braids in purple pajamas stands at a large bedroom window, pressing her hands against the glass. The night sky outside is unusually dark without any stars. Her room has warm yellow lighting from a small lamp, creating a cozy contrast to the dark sky. Her expression shows worry and confusion.
illustration.alt: Asha looking out her bedroom window at a starless night sky

pages.text: Asha picked up her favorite teddy bear, Milo, and hugged him tight. "I'm worried about the stars, Milo," she said sadly. "What if they never come back?" To her surprise, Milo's button eyes began to glow softly with golden light.

illustration.description: Asha sits on her bed holding a brown teddy bear with glowing golden button eyes. She has a sad expression as she hugs the bear close to her chest. The room is softly lit with warm tones, and her colorful quilt has star patterns on it. The teddy bear appears magical with a gentle golden aura around its eyes.
illustration.alt: Asha hugging her magical teddy bear Milo with glowing eyes

pages.text: "Don't be scared, Asha," said Milo in a gentle voice. "I know someone who can help us find the missing stars. But we need to be brave and go on a little adventure." Asha felt excited but still a little nervous about leaving her cozy room.

illustration.description: Milo the teddy bear sits upright on the bed next to Asha, now clearly alive and speaking. His mouth is open in a friendly smile, and his golden eyes continue to glow warmly. Asha looks surprised but interested, with her eyebrows raised and mouth slightly open. The background shows her bedroom with toys scattered around.
illustration.alt: Magical teddy bear Milo talking to surprised but curious Asha

pages.text: Milo took Asha's hand, and together they floated gently up to the dark sky. There, sitting on a silver cloud, was Luna the moon rabbit. "Hello, little one," Luna said kindly. "The stars are just playing hide-and-seek. Would you like to help me find them?"

illustration.description: Asha and Milo float in the night sky approaching a friendly white rabbit with silver markings sitting on a fluffy silver cloud. Luna the moon rabbit has long ears and kind, twinkling eyes. The sky is deep purple-blue, and all three characters have warm, welcoming expressions. Soft moonbeams create a magical atmosphere around them.
illustration.alt: Asha and Milo meeting Luna the moon rabbit on a silver cloud

pages.text: Luna showed them how the stars were hiding behind the clouds, giggling softly. "They forgot it was time to shine," Luna explained. Asha felt happy to help. She clapped her hands and called out, "Stars, it's time to light up the night!"

illustration.description: Asha claps her hands joyfully while floating next to Luna and Milo among puffy gray clouds. Little golden stars with smiling faces peek out from behind the clouds, some giggling with their hands over their mouths. The scene is playful and magical, with swirls of silver and gold light beginning to emerge from the hiding stars.
illustration.alt: Asha clapping to encourage the hiding stars to come out from the clouds

pages.text: One by one, the stars came out of their hiding places, twinkling brightly across the sky. Asha felt proud and brave. "Thank you for helping me not be scared," she told Luna and Milo. Soon, she was back in her cozy bed, watching the beautiful starlit sky through her window.

illustration.description: Asha is tucked into her bed with her star-patterned quilt, smiling peacefully as she looks out her window. The night sky is now filled with bright, twinkling stars of various sizes. Milo sits beside her as a regular teddy bear again, and the room is softly lit by starlight. Her expression shows contentment and happiness.
illustration.alt: Asha in bed looking at the restored starry night sky through her window

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Asha feel when she couldn't see the stars?
questions.explanation: Asha felt scared and worried when she looked out her window and couldn't see any stars in the sky.

questions.question: What made Milo the teddy bear special?
choices: His eyes could glow and he could talk
questions.explanation: Milo was magical because his button eyes could glow with golden light and he could talk to Asha.

questions.question: Where were the stars hiding?
questions.explanation: Luna the moon rabbit showed Asha and Milo that the stars were playing hide-and-seek behind the clouds.

questions.question: How did Asha feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Asha felt happy and proud because she helped bring the stars back and learned to be brave.

pages.title: Complete the Star Adventure
pages.text: Asha looked out her window but the sky was ___. She hugged her teddy bear Milo and felt ___. Luna the moon rabbit helped them find the ___ hiding behind the clouds.

pages.title: Feelings and Friends
pages.text: Milo's button eyes began to ___. Asha felt ___ when she helped the stars come out. At the end, she was ___ in her cozy bed.
